technology_stack.airspace_awareness: Dedrone - drone detection and airspace management

program_quotes.chief_theetge: Program aims to improve response times and officer safety by providing aerial awareness before units arrive on scene

cog_sci_relevance.vigilance: 8% of flights exceed Mackworth 20-min threshold — human operators would show degraded performance
cog_sci_relevance.spatial_concentration: 45.2% of flights within 1σ of center — Tyler predicts legitimacy concerns in heavily surveilled neighborhoods
cog_sci_relevance.temporal_pattern: 34.3% nighttime flights — Zacks event segmentation degrades in low-light conditions
cog_sci_relevance.automaticity: 8,254 flights provides extensive operator exposure — Bargh predicts automatic threat evaluation
cog_sci_relevance.sa_limitation: Flight duration measures detection (SA Level 1), not comprehension (SA Level 2) — Endsley's 75% failure rate applies

notes: Operational metrics significantly enriched by Cincinnati Enquirer investigative data (David Ferrara). ArcGIS FeatureServer provides real-time drone flight paths. FOIA request still recommended for officer-level response time and mission outcome data.
